Existing Pods must be RE-DEPLOYED (delete+create) to pull the new layer. Image ready for MPI-78 ephemeral re-verify + MPI-103 idle-timeout 10-min watchdog test. cpu/cu128 still pending.

Idle-watchdog verify finding: Pod did NOT self-stop after 22min idle because the LIVE app keeps the watchdog alive. MpiMemoryMonitor polls /remote/pod/stats every 2s -> proxies authed /wrapper/stats -> wrapper.watchdog.touch() resets the 10min deadline every tick. This is CORRECT design: the watchdog is a CRASH backstop (fires when the app is DEAD = no authed polls), not an idle-while-connected timer. F8(b) must be tested by KILLING the app (force-quit, no teardown) so polling stops; only then does the deadline run down + the Pod self-stops. Leaving the app running idle will never fire it. Live /health value + 600s floor already confirmed (idleTimeoutS:600 on the loopback status route).
